title: galium anglicum subsp. divaricatum
intro: Galium anglicum subsp. divaricatum, also known as the English bedstraw or divaricating bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bedstraw family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Galium anglicum subsp. divaricatum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
